output:
No

After following the instructions, you end up 6 steps to the right of where you started — not back at the starting point.

- Start at origin, facing forward.
- 6 steps backward → 6 units behind the start.
- 6 steps forward → back to the start.
- 6 steps right → 6 units to the right of the start.

The backward and forward cancel out, but the rightward steps leave you displaced.
